sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 시스코는 3분기 매출 158억 달러를 기록하며 가이던스 상단을 상회하는 실적을 달성했고, AI 인프라 수요 급증에 힘입어 연간 전망을 상향했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출 158억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 12% 성장하며 가이던스 상단을 상회하는 실적을 기록했습니다.
하이퍼스케일러의 AI 인프라 수요가 지속됨에 따라 2026 회계연도 매출 전망치를 기존 30억 달러에서 40억 달러로 상향 조정했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 네트워킹 제품 주문이 전년 대비 50% 이상 증가했으며, 캠퍼스 네트워킹 및 데이터 센터 스위칭 부문에서도 25%~40% 이상의 강력한 주문 성장세를 보였습니다.

financialHighlights.text: GAAP 기준 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.85달러로 전년 대비 37% 증가했으며, Non-GAAP 기준 EPS는 1.06달러를 기록했습니다.
2026 회계연도 전체 매출 가이던스를 628억~630억 달러로 제시했습니다.

watchItems.text: 향후 하이퍼스케일러 대상 AI 인프라 주문이 목표치인 90억 달러를 달성하며 지속적인 성장 동력으로 작용할지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991pressrelease-q3f.htm EX-99.1 Document Press Contact: Investor Relations Contact: Robyn Blum Sami Badri Cisco Cisco 1 (408) 930-8548 1 (469) 420-4834 rojenkin@cisco.com sambadri@cisco.com CISCO REPORTS THIRD QUARTER EARNINGS News Summary: • Double-digit top and bottom-line growth exceeding the high end of our guidance ◦ Record revenue of $15.8 billion, up 12% year over year; GAAP EPS of $0.85, up 37% year over year; and non-GAAP EPS of $1.06, up 10% year over year ◦ GAAP gross margin of 63.6% and non-GAAP gross margin of 66.0%; GAAP operating margin of 25.0% and non-GAAP operating margin of 34.2%, demonstrating strong execution and operational efficiencies • Broad-based, record high demand for Cisco technology ◦ Total product orders up 35% year over year; up 19% excluding hyperscalers ◦ Growth in networking product orders accelerated to more than 50% year over year •  Normalized numeric aliases: $15.8 billion = 158억 달러; $15.8 = 15.8달러; $0.85 = 0.85달러; $1.06 = 1.06달러.

ignificant momentum and raised expectations for AI infrastructure from hyperscalers ◦ $5.3 billion of orders taken year to date; raising expected FY26 orders to $9 billion, up from $5 billion ◦ Raising expected FY26 revenue to $4 billion, up from $3 billion • Major multi-year, multi-billion-dollar campus networking refresh cycle underway ◦ Campus networking orders grew greater than 25% year over year, with the next-generation portfolio ramping faster than prior product launches ◦ Data center switching orders grew greater than 40% year over year • Q3 FY 2026 Results: ◦ Revenue: $15.8 billion ▪ Increase of 12% year over year ◦ Earnings per Share: GAAP: $0.85; Non-GAAP: $1.06 ▪ GAAP EPS increased 37% year over year ▪ Non-GAAP EPS increase  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.3 billion = 53억 달러; $9 billion = 90억 달러; $5 billion = 50억 달러; $4 billion = 40억 달러; $3 billion = 30억 달러; $15.8 billion = 158억 달러; $16.7 billion = 167억 달러; $16.9 billion = 169억 달러; $5.3 = 5.3달러; $9 = 9달러; $5 = 5달러; $4 = 4달러.

1.18 • FY 2026 Guidance (1) : ◦ Revenue: $62.8 billion to $63.0 billion ◦ Earnings per Share: GAAP: $3.16 to $3.21; Non-GAAP: $4.27 to $4.29 (1) EPS guidance includes the estimated impact of tariffs based on current trade policy. 1 SAN JOSE, Calif. -- May 13, 2026 -- Cisco (NASDAQ: CSCO) today reported third quarter results for the period ended April 25, 2026. Cisco reported third quarter revenue of $15.8 billion, net income on a generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP) basis of $3.4 billion or $0.85 per share, and non-GAAP net income of $4.2 billion or $1.06 per share. “Cisco delivered record quarterly revenue in Q3 and we saw very strong, broad-based demand for our products, demonstrating the relevance of our technology  Normalized numeric aliases: $62.8 billion = 628억 달러; $63.0 billion = 630억 달러; $15.8 billion = 158억 달러; $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $4.2 billion = 42억 달러; $62.8 = 62.8달러; $63.0 = 63.0달러; $3.16 = 3.16달러; $3.21 = 3.21달러; $4.27 = 4.27달러; $4.29 = 4.29달러; $15.8 = 15.8달러.

our technology leadership and customer trust, while innovating at the speed and scale that our dynamic world demands.” “In Q3, we once again delivered double-digit growth on both the top and bottom lines which exceeded the high end of our guidance, coupled with record non-GAAP operating income,” said Mark Patterson, CFO of Cisco. “Our record results demonstrate great execution and financial discipline by our teams, enabling us to deliver shareholder value while we pursue the significant opportunities we see ahead.” GAAP Results Q3 FY 2026 Q3 FY 2025 vs. Q3 FY 2025 Revenue $ 15.8 billion $ 14.1 billion 12% Net Income $ 3.4 billion $ 2.5 billion 35% Diluted Earnings per Share (EPS) $ 0.85 $ 0.62 37% Non-GAAP Results Q3 FY 2026 Q3 FY 2025 vs. Q3 FY 2025 Net Income $ 4.2 billion $ 3.8 billion 10% EPS $ 1.06 $ 0.96 1  Normalized numeric aliases: $ 15.8 billion = 158억 달러; $ 14.1 billion = 141억 달러; $ 3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $ 2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $ 4.2 billion = 42억 달러; $ 3.8 billion = 38억 달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
